    $870 per person -- Landlord pays utilities Now renting for the 2027-2028 school year Spacious 5 bedroom home offering exceptional convenience near Downtown and local attractions. - 5 bedrooms / 2 bathrooms - Dining and living area with smart TV - 100% fully furnished - Large outdoor deck - Driveway and street parking - Short walk to local bars, restaurants, and campus bus line - Only a 10 minute dive to campus - 12 Month Lease (6/1/27-5/23/28) - Utilities Included

    Neighborhood: 13905

    • Community Vibe
      A strong sense of community is fostered through local events and friendly neighbors, promoting a welcoming environment.
    • Dining Scene
      A variety of restaurants and cafes cater to diverse tastes, making dining out a delightful experience for locals.
    • Family Vibes
      The neighborhood is dotted with parks and community centers that provide ample opportunities for family activities and gatherings.
    • Green Spaces
      Abundant parks and green areas create an inviting atmosphere for outdoor leisure and recreational activities.

    The 13905 area offers a blend of suburban charm and urban convenience, making it a delightful place to call home. Residents enjoy a temperate climate with four distinct seasons, perfect for outdoor activities in nearby parks such as the picturesque Otsiningo Park. The local dining scene is diverse, featuring everything from cozy cafes to international eateries, while shopping options abound with several grocery stores and boutiques within reach. Family-friendly amenities, including playgrounds and community centers, enhance the neighborhood's appeal, and pets are welcome at many parks and pet-friendly establishments. The median rent in this area is approximately $1,200, with rental prices typically ranging from $900 to $1,600.

    Frequently asked questions

    What is the walk score of 56 Walnut St?

    56 Walnut St has a walk score of 77, it's very walkable.

    What schools are assigned to 56 Walnut St?

    The schools assigned to 56 Walnut St include Horace Mann School, West Middle School, and Binghamton High School.

    Does 56 Walnut St have in-unit laundry?

    Yes, 56 Walnut St has in-unit laundry for some or all of the units.

    What neighborhood is 56 Walnut St in?

    56 Walnut St is in the 13905 neighborhood in Binghamton, NY.
